hero.introduction: Passionate about creating secure, scalable digital solutions and designing robust network architectures. Specializing in modern web development and enterprise networking.

about.title: Get to Know Me
about.subtitle: A passionate developer and network designer dedicated to building secure and scalable digital experiences.
about.sectionEducationContent: I hold a Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, providing a deep foundation in both software systems and digital protection.
about.sectionFocusContent: I specialize in full-stack development and secure network architecture, bridging the gap between elegant user experiences and robust back-end security.
about.sectionExpertiseContent: From designing scalable cloud infrastructures to crafting interactive front-end applications, I focus on delivering performance-driven technology solutions.
about.sectionMissionContent: My approach combines clean code practices with a security-first mindset, ensuring that every digital product I build is as safe as it is functional.

skills.title: Technical Skills
skills.description: A comprehensive overview of the technologies and tools I master to build modern digital solutions.

projects.title: Featured Projects
projects.description: A showcase of my recent work across web development and enterprise network architecture.

contact.title: Let's Collaborate
contact.description: Ready to bring your vision to life? Reach out and let's start a conversation about your next big project.
contact.connectDescription: I'm always open to discussing new projects, creative ideas or opportunities to be part of your visions.
